featureNumberList.heading: Support Each Stage of Your Project Life Cycle with a

lifecycleItems.title: Bidding & Pre-Construction 🎯
lifecycleItems.description: Centralise bid documents and RFPs in collaborative workspaces. Track deadlines, assign team members to proposals, and maintain databases of past bids with automated notifications.

lifecycleItems.title: Planning & Design 📋
lifecycleItems.description: Transform schedules into visual timelines with dependencies and critical path tracking. Coordinate stakeholders with shared boards that automatically update on design changes and milestone achievements.

lifecycleItems.title: Execution & Construction 🏗️
lifecycleItems.description: Monitor progress, track labor hours, and manage deliveries through mobile dashboards. Field teams update tasks and upload photos while managers maintain oversight through automated progress and budget reports.

lifecycleItems.title: Handover & Closeout 📁
lifecycleItems.description: Organise punch lists, warranties, and inspections in structured workflows. Track outstanding items and coordinate final walkthroughs with automated reminders for efficient project closeout.

lifecycleItems.title: Post-Construction Support 🔧
lifecycleItems.description: Maintain client relationships with warranty tracking and maintenance scheduling. Historical project data improves future estimates and business processes.

testimonials.title: HOLT CAT Case Study
testimonials.quote: monday.com has given us the visibility we need to get everyone on the same page and keep track of all the moving parts.
testimonials.author: Jason Doan | VP of Heavy Rental & Sales, HOLT CAT
testimonials.imageAlt: Fruition monday.com consulting solution for construction — HOLT CAT

testimonials.title: Falkbuilt Case Study
testimonials.quote: The monday.com mobile app gives our technicians on raw construction sites instant access to the project information they need and makes connecting with the team at HQ easy.
testimonials.author: Allie Swindlehurst | Operations Manager, Falkbuilt
testimonials.imageAlt: Fruition monday.com consulting solution for construction — Falkbuilt

unrecoverableFiles._explanation: The following files were listed as untracked (??) in the git status snapshot but were NEVER committed to git. They have since been deleted from disk and cannot be recovered from git history, dangling objects, or reflog. If these files existed, they were created locally and removed before ever being staged or committed.
